title: Pet Import Guide: United Kingdom
description: Complete guide to importing your dog or cat to United Kingdom. Import requirements, quarantine, breed restrictions, and step-by-step process.
name: United Kingdom
overview: Importing a pet to United Kingdom is moderately strict. United Kingdom also bans certain breeds from entry. Here's what you need to know.

import_requirements.microchip: Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted BEFORE rabies vaccination. Vaccine is invalid if microchipped after.
import_requirements.rabies_titre_test: Required for: Pets from unlisted countries (countries not on UK Part 1 or Part 2 lists)
import_requirements.import_permit: Pet travel document (AHC or pet passport) serves as permit equivalent
import_requirements.health_certificate: Animal Health Certificate (AHC) or EU Pet Passport. Valid 10 days.
import_requirements.tapeworm_treatment: Required for Dogs only. Timing: 24-120 hours before scheduled arrival time in GB.
import_requirements.banned_breeds: Pit Bull Terrier, Japanese Tosa, Dogo Argentino, Fila Brasileiro

sections.heading: Import requirements for United Kingdom
sections.body:
**Microchip:** Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted BEFORE rabies vaccination. Vaccine is invalid if microchipped after.

**Rabies Vaccination:** Required. 21-day wait after first vaccination

**Rabies Titre Test:** Required for: Pets from unlisted countries (countries not on UK Part 1 or Part 2 lists)

**Quarantine:** Not required (penalty quarantine if non-compliant)

**Import Permit:** Pet travel document (AHC or pet passport) serves as permit equivalent

**Health Certificate:** Animal Health Certificate (AHC) or EU Pet Passport. Valid 10 days.

**Tapeworm Treatment:** Required for Dogs only. Timing: 24-120 hours before scheduled arrival time in GB.

sections.heading: Breed restrictions in United Kingdom
sections.body:
Governed by: Dangerous Dogs Act 1991 (as amended)

- Pit Bull Terrier: banned

- Japanese Tosa: banned

- Dogo Argentino: banned

- Fila Brasileiro: banned

sections.body:

faqs.question: What vaccinations does my pet need to enter United Kingdom?
faqs.answer: At minimum, a rabies vaccination is required. Required. 21-day wait after first vaccination Your pet must also be microchipped before vaccination.

faqs.question: Is there quarantine in United Kingdom?
Which airlines fly pets to United Kingdom?
faqs.answer: Multiple airlines serve pet cargo to United Kingdom. Check our route-specific guides for airline details on your particular origin-destination pair.
